evals.expected_output: A well-structured review of the last commit with proper severity classification, no false positives, and a clear verdict. Should use confidence tags (confirmed/likely/verify) and include the Files table if 3+ files changed.
Review of staged changes only. If nothing is staged, should report 'Nothing staged for commit' and stop. Otherwise, full review of staged diff with appropriate tier selection.

Audit mode review of the src directory. Should negotiate scope if >200 files, dispatch parallel agents for 10+ files, and produce a project assessment covering CI gates, test infrastructure, and documentation quality.
